current_priorities.action: Monitor whether NVIDIA reroutes China demand through partners or loses it permanently. Update thesis if H20 ban becomes permanent.

decisions.decision_question: Should SK Hynix be investigated, bought, watched, or avoided based on AI memory demand, valuation, and cycle risk?

decisions.title: SK Hynix: investigate, buy, watch, or avoid
decisions.tracking_metric: HBM demand, AI memory pricing, capex discipline, gross margin trend, and customer concentration.

decisions.decision_question: Is the Nashville transition ready to execute, or should it remain in preparation?

recent_changes.signal: The read-side GitHub memory contract is operational; the next required proof is a complete write-import-export-read loop.

recent_lessons.entity: How You Define the Problem Determines Whether You Solve It
recent_lessons.lesson: A business rep becomes valuable when it turns observation into offer, test, and measured outcome.

Data turns vague feeling into measurable signal. Without data you say 'I feel stronger.' With data you know Exercise A produced 0.18 inches, Exercise B 0.05. Without data you say 'sales are down.' With data you know repeat customers fell from 41% to 23%. Data gives the map. Feedback updates the map. Reps train the driver. Intelligence is how well you route.

recent_lessons.lesson: Non-trackable signal is not actionable. Every saved signal needs proof, metric, trigger, or next review.

top_patterns.pattern: Non-trackable signal is useless; every signal needs a metric, trigger, action, or review loop.
Signals become more powerful when they are broken into labeled assets with metrics, examples, and resurfacing triggers.
When repeated objections cluster around one offer, test clarity before adding more traffic.
Scaling exposes weak process; training, SOPs, and feedback loops are infrastructure.
